title: F1 Race Standings Web App Implementation

steps.description: Create domain layer value objects and entities
steps.done_condition: All domain types pass type checks and unit tests

steps.description: Implement ports layer with RaceResultsPort and DriverStatsPort interfaces
steps.done_condition: Ports interfaces compile and pass unit tests

steps.description: Implement mock adapter for historical data access
steps.done_condition: MockAdapter passes integration tests with domain layer

steps.description: Implement API adapter for live race data
steps.done_condition: APIAdapter passes integration tests with domain layer

steps.description: Implement primary adapter for React frontend integration
steps.done_condition: ReactAdapter passes integration tests with domain layer

steps.description: Implement standings use case with race results aggregation
steps.done_condition: Standings use case passes unit tests with mock and API adapters

steps.description: Implement driver profiles use case with stat aggregation
steps.done_condition: Driver profiles use case passes unit tests with mock and API adapters

steps.description: Implement composition root with React integration
steps.done_condition: Composition root passes integration tests with all adapters

riskRegister.mitigation: Implement caching layer in API adapter
riskRegister.risk: API rate limiting affecting live data

riskRegister.mitigation: Use adapter pattern for data transformation

successCriteria: All domain logic passes unit tests
Mock and API adapters pass integration tests
Composition root integrates with React frontend
